mnemonics: USE AVID: Understand, Specify, Extract, Analyze, Validate, Iterate & Document
keyPoints: Requirements come from user research, not assumptions.
They must be specific, measurable, and testable.
The process is iterative and involves constant validation with users.
commonMistakes: Designing based on personal preference rather than user needs.
Creating vague requirements that are impossible to test or measure.
Treating the extraction as a one-time task instead of a continuous process.
